sections.title: Getting Started
items: Create or use a demo account to access the platform.
Start with the Overview dashboard to understand sessions, temperature, and context.
Use Review and Academy together to improve decision quality over time.

sections.title: Access Layers
items: Free: Overview, Macro, limited Academy preview, Profile.
Premium: Intelligence, Liquidity, Review, Reports, Alerts, full Academy.

sections.title: Platform Philosophy
items: The system avoids targets, urgency, and hype language.
The goal is calmer and more structured decision-making.
